description: Unofficial Eight Sleep MCP server: read sleep trends, temperature, alarms; gated pod control.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/eight-sleep-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Eight Sleep account email. Optional when configured with eight-sleep-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Eight Sleep account password. Prefer the setup command so this secret is stored in ~/.eight-sleep-mcp/config.json (chmod 600) instead of MCP client config.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable write tools (set_temperature, set_side, set_away_mode, snooze/dismiss alarm). Default false (read-only).
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_ALLOW_MUTATIONS

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local token path. Defaults to ~/.eight-sleep-mcp/tokens.json.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the Android-app client_id default.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the Android-app client_secret default.
environmentVariables.name: EIGHT_SLEEP_CLIENT_SECRET
